assertion_results.text: The unsupported ecosystem notification uses the detected ecosystem name ('Go modules') — not a hard-coded ecosystem name (Step 5.3 unsupported ecosystem handling)
assertion_results.evidence: The notification in unsupported-ecosystem.md says: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: Go modules is not yet supported for automated triage.' The data-extraction.md confirms the detected ecosystem was 'Go modules' (line 30: 'Detected ecosystem: **Go modules**'). The notification uses 'Go modules' which matches the detected ecosystem name, not a hard-coded value.

assertion_results.text: The notification follows the template pattern: the message contains the actual ecosystem name substituted into the placeholder, matching the angle-bracket placeholder convention used by other user-facing messages in the skill
assertion_results.evidence: The skill template in SKILL.md lines 418-419 defines: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: <ecosystem> is not yet supported for automated triage. Manual assessment is required.' The output in unsupported-ecosystem.md reads: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: Go modules is not yet supported for automated triage. Manual assessment is required.' This correctly substitutes 'Go modules' for the <ecosystem> placeholder, matching the template pattern exactly.

assertion_results.text: Automated triage stops after the unsupported ecosystem notification — no version impact analysis or remediation task creation is performed for the unsupported ecosystem
assertion_results.evidence: The unsupported-ecosystem.md explicitly states: 'Automated triage for TC-8040 (CVE-2026-31812, quinn-proto) has stopped at Step 1 (Ecosystem Detection).' and 'No version impact analysis, Affects Versions correction, or remediation task creation has been performed.' The outputs directory contains only data-extraction.md and unsupported-ecosystem.md — no version-impact-analysis or remediation files exist, confirming triage stopped.

assertion_results.text: The notification includes both the ecosystem name and the instruction that manual assessment is required
assertion_results.evidence: The notification in unsupported-ecosystem.md line 3 reads: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: Go modules is not yet supported for automated triage. Manual assessment is required.' This contains both the ecosystem name ('Go modules') and the manual assessment instruction ('Manual assessment is required'). The expanded explanation on line 9 also reiterates: 'A manual assessment of the vulnerability's impact on supported product versions is required before triage can proceed.'
